acceptAward().notice: Awarded contractor accepts the milestone schedule.

castCompletionVote(uint8).notice: Community member casts final completion vote.

castMilestoneVote(uint8,uint8).notice: Community member casts vote on a milestone (for COUNCIL_MEMBER_QUORUM and FULL_COMMUNITY_VOTE types).

castProposalVote(bool).notice: Community member casts vote on proposal.

councilDecision(uint8,string,bytes[]).notice: Council submits decision on a COUNCIL_REVIEW proposal.

executeMediationRuling((address,address,.notice: Platform mediation key executes a binding ruling.

fundEscrow(uint256,address).notice: Funder deposits escrow (USDT or USDC). Must match sum of milestone values.

raiseDispute(string).notice: Either party raises a dispute. Freezes remaining escrow.

requestPortionGrant(uint256,string).notice: Contractor requests a mobilisation advance. Max 30% of total.

signMilestone(uint8).notice: Council member signs a milestone (for COUNCIL_ONLY and COUNCIL_MEMBER_QUORUM types).

submitBid((uint256,string,uint256,string.notice: Contractor submits a bid during the bidding window.

submitMilestoneCompletion(uint8,string).notice: Contractor claims completion of a milestone with evidence.
